headline: Equity Residential Merger With AvalonBay Reshapes Scale Valuation And Outlook
summary: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) and AvalonBay Communities agreed to merge in an all stock transaction. The combination is set to create one of the largest publicly traded apartment real estate companies. Management of both companies highlighted expected merger synergies and improved growth prospects for the combined platform. For investors following apartment REITs, this deal brings together two large owners and operators of multifamily properties into a single company with broader reach and...
